empty.noProperties: No properties linked to your account.

sidebar.actionItemsHint: Late rent, expiring leases, and unresolved issues that need your attention.

home.emptyDescription: Connect your banking and property details to turn this view into a live snapshot of expenses, utilities, and recurring costs.
home.myUploadsDescription: Keep insurance, mortgage, warranty, and inspection files you upload yourself in one place. Shared documents from your team stay in Documents.

tour.assistantDescription: The search bar is the fastest way to check maintenance, documents, or property to-dos without digging through every tab.
tour.actionItemsDescription: This replaces the old at-risk label with a clearer queue of rent, lease, and maintenance items that still need a decision.
tour.documentsTitle: Separate personal uploads from shared docs
tour.documentsDescription: Use My Uploads for files you add yourself, and Shared Documents for leases or reports your team publishes for you.

screeningConfig.templateDescription: Choose a pre-built screening template based on your subscription plan.
screeningConfig.criteriaDescription: Set the minimum thresholds and disclosures applicants must review before screening starts.
screeningConfig.optionalChecksDescription: Enable extra checks that your plan allows beyond the template defaults.

optionalChecks.identityDescription: Add an identity check to the screening package applicants consent to.

screeningConfig.applicantNotesDescription: Add applicant-facing notes for criteria or disclosures that are not already covered by the thresholds above.
screeningConfig.applicantNotesPlaceholder: Example: Applicants must be ready to provide recent pay stubs and a government-issued ID if requested.
screeningConfig.selectedChecks: Checks included in this application flow
screeningConfig.questionsDescription: Add your own questions for applicants to answer.
screeningConfig.emptyQuestions: No custom questions yet. Add questions to gather additional information from applicants.
screeningConfig.deleteDescription: This will remove the question from all future applications.
screeningConfig.optionsPlaceholder: Option A, Option B, Option C
